title: GitHub Actions Job
description: Represents a job within a GitHub Actions workflow run.

id.description: The unique identifier of the job.

run_id.description: The ID of the associated workflow run.

run_url.description: The API URL of the associated workflow run.

run_attempt.description: Attempt number of the associated workflow run.

node_id.description: The GraphQL node ID of the job.

head_sha.description: The SHA of the commit being run.

url.description: The API URL of the job.

html_url.description: The HTML URL of the job on GitHub.

status.description: The phase of the lifecycle that the job is currently in.

created_at.description: The time the job was created.

started_at.description: The time that the job started.

completed_at.description: The time that the job finished.

name.description: The name of the job step.

status.description: The phase of the lifecycle that the job step is currently in.

conclusion.description: The outcome of the job step.

number.description: The index of the step in the job.

completed_at.description: The time that the step finished.

labels.description: Labels for the workflow job used to identify runner targets.

runner_id.description: The ID of the runner that is running this job.

runner_name.description: The name of the runner that is running this job.

runner_group_id.description: The ID of the runner group that is running this job.

runner_group_name.description: The name of the runner group that is running this job.
